shortAnswer: To apply for Massachusetts Tech Startup Grants 2026-2027, start by reviewing the eligibility criteria and preparing a project proposal. Complete 2026-2027 guide to Massachusetts technology startup grants and incentives. SBIR START tiered grants up to $500K from MassVentures, MassCEC InnovateMass clean energy grants $350K,. Funding available: up to $500K (with related programs offering $350K).
shortAnswerQuestion: How can my business apply for Massachusetts Tech Startup Grants 2026-2027 in 2026?

faq.question: What is the MassCEC InnovateMass program?
faq.answer: The InnovateMass program provides up to $250,000 in grant funding and technical support for clean energy technology commercialization and demonstration projects in Massachusetts.

faq.question: Does Massachusetts match federal SBIR grants?
faq.answer: Yes, through the START (Small Business Technology and Research) program. MassVentures provides Tier 1, 2, and 3 matching grants to help SBIR Phase II winners commercialize their technology.

faq.question: Are there incentives for hiring in Massachusetts?
faq.answer: Yes, the Workforce Training Fund Program (WTFP) provides grants up to $250,000 to help Massachusetts companies train current and newly hired employees.

expertTip.title: SBIR START Program
expertTip.content: MassVentures SBIR START matches your federal SBIR with up to $500K in additional state funding. Apply immediately after federal award notification.
